---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something OCM should do that it doesn't yet
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Before opening**
- [ ] I checked the [v1 design spec](../docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-08-ocm-v1-design-spec.md) — this isn't already a locked decision I missed
- [ ] I checked the v1→v6 roadmap in `README.md` — this isn't already on a future-version track

**The problem**
What you're trying to do that's currently hard or impossible. One paragraph.

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like OCM to do. Pseudocode / API sketch welcome.

**Alternatives considered**
Other approaches you thought about and why they didn't fit.

**Roadmap fit**
Where this lands relative to the existing v1→v6 plan, in your view:
- [ ] v1 polish (before v0.1.0 ships)
- [ ] v1.x patch
- [ ] v2 (mesh)
- [ ] v3-v6 (later versions)
- [ ] Doesn't fit cleanly — needs design discussion

**Additional context**
Links to upstream tools, papers, or related projects.
